summary: First iteration end-to-end testing of RaktaSetu AI. Backend: 15/15 pytest cases passed (health, stats, donors, blood-banks, requests, matches, notifications, chat SSE, chat history, document vision, camps + awareness). Frontend: all 7 pages loaded, chat streams Hindi reply, create-request modal → dashboard flow works, matches load (7 compatible B+ donors ranked), notify dispatches, donor register redirects, camps generate AI awareness post, document vision extracts structured JSON with 100% confidence, architecture page renders proof-of-work. No blocking issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: Chat endpoint persists both user and assistant messages via db.chat_messages — good. However there is a subtle bug: the finally block writes the assistant message AFTER the yield of the 'done' event, which is fine, but if an exception occurs mid-stream the partial `full` text is still saved (acceptable).
server.py:206 `if not doc.get('lat') or not doc.get('lng')` will overwrite when lat/lng is 0 or falsy (e.g., 0.0). Consider `is None` check.
seed_data.py DEMO_DONORS scores are static; auto-seed runs only on empty DB — OK.

server.py: matches endpoint falls back to `find({})` if city has no donors — could return donors from other cities with huge haversine distances. Acceptable for demo; consider adding a city radius or filter.
DocumentAnalyzer JSON parse fallback returns `{raw: text}` if malformed; UI Rows handle missing keys gracefully (shows '—').
No pagination on /api/requests, /api/notifications — fine for demo scale.
CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True is not spec-compliant but works in browsers with wildcard fallback. Acceptable for demo.
test_credentials: No auth required (demo mode by design).
seed_data_creation: Auto-seed on startup created 15 donors, 6 blood banks, 3 camps. Tests added TEST_ prefixed donor/patient/camp records.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend hosted at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All pytest tests are in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — run via `pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. Uses PIL to build a realistic prescription PNG for /api/document/analyze; Gemini 3 Flash successfully extracts structured JSON. Chat SSE returns `data: {json}\n\n` events. Match ranking is verified for B+ recipient (only O-, O+, B-, B+ compatible donors returned). Document upload on UI uses hidden file input — use page.set_input_files on '[data-testid=doc-file-input]' instead of clicking (label wraps it).
